headline: Keysight Technologies (KEYS) Stock Could Be 5.1% Undervalued After AI Deals And Strong Outlook
summary: Keysight Technologies (KEYS) is back in focus after a series of AI centered moves, including a Siemens partnership for automated testing and the completed acquisition of VPIphotonics for photonic system simulation. See our latest analysis for Keysight Technologies. Those AI focused updates have coincided with strong market interest, with Keysight Technologies posting a 90 day share price return of 31.04% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 127.09%, signalling firm momentum rather than a...
